message:
feat(pages): remove unimplemented --include-attachments flag [adyyt]

Mock-finder bead adyyt surfaced that `--include-attachments` was a
live CLI flag + config field + wizard state field that the pages
export pipeline could not fulfill:

- src/lib.rs:937-940 exposed `--include-attachments` as a hidden
  clap arg on the pages command
- src/lib.rs:3543-3554 hard-rejected any invocation with the flag:
  "--include-attachments is not implemented for pages exports"
- src/pages/config_input.rs:244-247 accepted
  bundle.include_attachments in JSON config
- src/pages/config_input.rs:519-524 rejected that field at
  validation time with the same error
- src/pages/wizard.rs:94 carried `include_attachments: bool` on
  WizardState with a setter + Debug formatter entry
- tests scattered across src/lib.rs, src/pages/{config_input,wizard}.rs,
  tests/{pages_wizard, pages_pipeline_e2e, e2e_pages, cli_robot}.rs
  existed only to pin the "accepted but rejected" mock contract.

Attachment blob discovery / processing / bundling has partial
primitives (src/pages/attachments.rs has AttachmentProcessor,
write_encrypted_blobs, etc.) used by key-management and tests, but
the end-to-end pages export pipeline has no callers. Implementing
the end-to-end story (discovering refs in session JSON, copying/
encrypting blobs, emitting a manifest, enforcing path/size/MIME
limits, wiring through wizard + TUI) is a multi-day feature — out
of scope for a correctness fix.

Per the bead's second suggested option ("If attachment bundling is
intentionally out of scope, remove the accepted option/config field
and misleading partial surface instead of leaving a live unimplemented
switch"), this commit removes the entire mock surface:

1. src/lib.rs — remove clap arg (+hide flag), allowed-flags-list
   entry, match destructure, config-override block, explicit
   rejection block, wizard setter call, and two tests
   (pages_cli_flag_tests module).

2. src/pages/config_input.rs — remove include_attachments from
   ResolvedBundle + BundleConfig + Default, validation rejection,
   to_resolved + to_wizard_state mappings, docstring example,
   example_config JSON, and two rejection tests.

3. src/pages/wizard.rs — remove include_attachments from WizardState
   + Debug formatter + Default init, remove set_include_attachments
   setter, remove default-assertion + setter test.

4. tests/pages_wizard.rs — remove default-assertion and
   test_wizard_state_with_attachments struct-literal test.

5. tests/pages_pipeline_e2e.rs + tests/e2e_pages.rs — remove
   include_attachments from two JSON config fixtures so
   example_config parsing still round-trips.

6. tests/cli_robot.rs — remove include_attachments_flag_hidden_from_pages_help
   (the flag is gone; "hidden from help" is trivially true).

All src/pages/attachments.rs primitives are left intact — they are
not mock code; they are used by key-management and encryption tests
independently of the unshipped pages-export attachment feature. Any
future attachment-bundling work re-adds `--include-attachments` with
end-to-end implementation + fresh tests at that time.

Verified: cargo check --lib --tests clean. cargo test --lib
pages:: passes 496/496. cargo test --test pages_wizard passes.

Refs coding_agent_session_search-adyyt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
